name: Jerome B. Grubart, Inc. v. Great Lakes Dredge & Dock Company
question: Does a federal district court have federal admiralty jurisdiction to determine and limit the extent of the Great Lakes Dredge and Dock Company’s tort liability?
description: A case in which the Court held that a federal district court had federal admiralty jurisdiction to determine and limit the extent of the Great Lakes Dredge and Dock Company’s tort liability.
